title: Three Penny Opera
writer: Bertolt Brecht, Wolfgang Staudte, Günther Weisenborn
actors: Curd Jürgens, Hildegard Knef, Gert Fröbe
plot: The Gangster Macheath secretly marries the daughter of beggar king Peachum. When Peachum finds out, he instructs the police chief Brown to arrest and hang Macheath. If not, all the beggars of Soho will disturb the upcoming coronat...
